title: Database Administrator I
description: Shopify is hiring a Database Administrator I for our Tampa operations center. You'll manage databases powering our e-commerce platform, ensuring availability, performance, and data integrity for millions of merchants. Join a team passionate about building infrastructure at scale in a collaborative, growth-focused environment.
responsibilities: Administer PostgreSQL and MySQL databases, performing patches, upgrades, and maintenance
Monitor database performance, capacity, and health; implement optimization strategies
Design and execute backup and disaster recovery procedures with rigorous testing
Manage database access controls and security policies
Support application development teams in schema design and query optimization

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
skills: Proficiency with monitoring and logging tools

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance
